label: Series record
description: All-time regular-season record (this owner's wins first) with win %.

label: Playoff record
description: Postseason series record (this owner's wins first); 'None' if they've never met in the playoffs.

label: Toilet bowl record
description: Toilet-bowl series record (this owner's wins first); 'None' if they've never met in the toilet bowl.

label: Points (H2H)
description: Total points each owner has scored across every meeting, with the running differential.

label: Avg margin
description: Average margin per meeting; the arrow points to who's ahead on average.

label: Current streak
description: Who is currently on a winning streak against the other, and how long.

label: Last meeting
description: Their most recent meeting — score, margin, and when.

label: Clutch meetings
description: Record in meetings decided by under 10 points; the arrow points to who's ahead.

label: Closest game
description: Their smallest-margin meeting; the arrow points to who won it.

label: Highest shootout
description: Their highest combined-score meeting; the arrow points to who won it.

label: Lowest slugfest
description: Their lowest combined-score meeting; the arrow points to who won it.

label: Avg score
description: Average points this owner has scored per meeting with the other.

label: Longest win streak
description: The longest run of consecutive wins this owner has had over the other.

label: Biggest win
description: This owner's largest margin of victory over the other — score, margin, and when.

label: Held under 100
description: Number of meetings in which this owner held the other under 100 points.

label: Lucky wins
description: Wins over the other while scoring below that week's league median — you stole one.

label: Unlucky losses
description: Losses to the other while you scored above that week's league median — they handed you a bad beat.
